title: cyclosorus abruptus
intro: Cyclosorus abruptus, also known as the abrupt sword fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Cyclosorus abruptus include the potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
